name: Bare except swallows all errors
description: Adds a bare 'except: pass' that silently swallows every exception, including KeyboardInterrupt and SystemExit, hiding real failures.
diff:
--- a/worker.py
+++ b/worker.py
@@ -10,6 +10,9 @@ def run_job(job):
     try:
         job.process()
+    except:
+        pass
     finally:
         job.cleanup()
